title: teucrium polium subsp. purpurascens
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. purpurascens, also known as the Purple Teucrium, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Purple Teucrium include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
